name: Quarter Sheets
teaser: Looks like Detroit, but far more flavor and complexity thanks to natural fermentation and whole wheat flour.
review:
This looks like Detroit, but there's so much more flavor and complexity compared to the traditional style, thanks to natural fermentation and high-quality whole wheat flour. It's denser than you'd expect, but you don't feel like you got gut-punched when you unconsciously crush three slices in eleven minutes.

Before you think you can get away clean, check out the next-level desserts. While takeout works, they have great staff, a perfectly-calibrated 70s throwback interior, and dine-in only specials like tavern pies â so it's worth the work to get a reservation or walk in.
headsUp: Dine-in only for tavern pies. Worth getting a reservation.
update: Desserts have leveled up significantly. Leave room.
address: 1305 Portia St, Los Angeles, CA 90026, USA
hours: Monday: Closed · Tuesday: 5:00 – 9:00 PM · Wednesday: 5:00 – 9:00 PM · Thursday: 5:00 – 9:00 PM · Friday: 5:00 – 9:00 PM · Saturday: 5:00 – 9:00 PM · Sunday: 5:00 – 9:00 PM
